_meta.note: Single source of truth for every bare act the engine ingests. To ADD an act: (1) drop a CSV with a 'section'/'article' column plus any of offence/description/punishment, (2) add an entry below with a 'provenance' block. No code changes. See data/acts/README.md.
_meta.verification_note: Acts flagged verified:false carry curated starter text and surface as 'Curated — confirm before relying' in the UI. Replace the CSV with the official bare act, set verified:true, fill provenance.retrieved_at, and re-run scripts/build_index.py to promote them to 'Official'.
_meta.provenance_note: Every act carries a 'provenance' block (authority, source_url, retrieved_at) that is stamped onto each chunk and shown on each citation. retrieved_at is null until the text is taken from — and checked against — the cited authority.

provenance.authority: Courtbook.in (BNS bare act); all 358 section headings cross-checked against the official NCRB Corresponding Section Table
provenance.note: Full provision text is from a secondary source (Courtbook), heading-verified against the official NCRB table; spot-checks (s.103, s.318) matched the official India Code PDF verbatim. Replace with India-Code-parsed text for fully first-party provenance.

acts.title: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005

provenance.authority: India Code (indiacode.nic.in) — Consumer Protection Act, 2019, Act 35 of 2019
provenance.note: Section text parsed verbatim from the official India Code PDF (scripts/ingest_cpa_2019.py). The pecuniary-jurisdiction figures in ss.34/47/58 carry an inline, attributed note with the CURRENT limits per the Consumer Protection (Jurisdiction of the District, State and National Commission) Rules, 2021, which superseded the enacted figures.

provenance.authority: India Code (indiacode.nic.in) — Code on Wages, 2019 (Act 29 of 2019), text as in force from 21 Nov 2025
provenance.note: One of the four Labour Codes brought into force on 21 Nov 2025. Per s.69 it REPEALED the Payment of Wages Act 1936, Minimum Wages Act 1948, Payment of Bonus Act 1965 and Equal Remuneration Act 1976 — so this is the CURRENT wage/bonus/minimum-wage law. Parsed verbatim from the official India Code PDF (scripts/ingest_act_pdf.py); s.39 (set-on/set-off of allocable surplus) was not captured (its header was not at a line start in the PDF extraction).

provenance.authority: India Code (indiacode.nic.in) — Industrial Relations Code, 2020 (Act 35 of 2020), text as in force from 21 Nov 2025
provenance.note: One of the four Labour Codes brought into force on 21 Nov 2025. Per s.104 it REPEALED the Trade Unions Act 1926, Industrial Employment (Standing Orders) Act 1946 and Industrial Disputes Act 1947 — so this is the CURRENT law on retrenchment, dismissal, layoff, standing orders and industrial-dispute resolution. Parsed verbatim from the official India Code PDF; s.92 was not captured (header not at a line start in the PDF extraction).
